data.title: Infrastructure Capital Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase for: Infrastructure Capital Small Cap Income ETF (SCAP), Infrastructure Capital Equity Income ETF (ICAP)
data.description: Infrastructure Capital Advisors, a top investment management firm catering to income-focused investors, has revealed its most recent monthly dividend for the BNDS ETF. The announcement was made on March 27, 2026, in New York. With a notable stature in the industry, Infrastructure Capital is known for providing tailored solutions.

data.title: Profound Medical Congratulates Texas Prostate on Achieving 100th TULSA Procedure™ Milestone
data.description: In Toronto on March 27, 2026, Profound Medical Corp. revealed that Texas Prostate, under Dr. James Cochran, has successfully completed their 100th TULSA Procedure™ at Dallas Medical Center using AI-powered, MRI-guided, non-invasive therapies for treating diseased tissue. Profound Medical Corp. is known for developing such technologies and is traded on NASDAQ under PROF and TSX under PRN.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From FactSet Research Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
data.description: FactSet Research Systems Inc. is scheduled to announce its second-quarter earnings on Tuesday, March 31. Analysts are predicting earnings of $4.37 per share, an increase from $4.28 per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $604.8 million, compared to $570.66 million in the previous year. RBC Capital analyst Ashish Sabadra, on March 18, reaffirmed FactSet Research with a Sector Perform rating and reduced the price target to $243 from $320. FactSet Research's current annual dividend yield is 2.24%, with a quarterly dividend of $1.10 per share ($4.40 annually). Investors are keeping an eye on potential gains from dividends amidst the increased attention on FactSet Research.

data.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Enters into Employment and Equity Award Agreements with President and CEO
data.description: Miami based Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) has recently made public an agreement signed on March 26, 2026, with John W. Chidsey, the company's President and CEO. The agreement includes terms related to employment and restricted share unit awards, following Chidsey's appointment. Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. is a prominent player in the global cruise industry, overseeing operations of Norwegian Cruise Line, Oceania Cruises, and Regent Seven Seas Cruises.

data.title: Savannah Guthrie rejoining 'Today' as anchor on April 6, over two months after her mother vanished.
data.description: The return of the anchor to the show was announced by NBC to take place on April 6, slightly over two months following the disappearance of her mother.

data.title: Canopy Growth Announces Storz & Bickel Executive Transition
data.description: Canopy Growth Corporation appointed David Männer as the new Managing Director of Storz & Bickel, a subsidiary of the company, starting from April 1, 2026. This move follows the decision of Jürgen Bickel, the Co-founder of Storz & Bickel, to step down from his role. Storz & Bickel, established in 2001, has become a prominent player in vaporization technology worldwide. Canopy Growth Corporation is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol WEED and on the Nasdaq as CGC.
